name: harness
description: Project-agnostic AI coding harness — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) + a GLOBAL slash-command set (commands/) AND the harness CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `harness self-update`. Falls back to a global `harness` on PATH when present.
